name: Reputology
description:
Reputology is a reputation and customer feedback management platform, offering a white-label solution tailor-made for agencies. Integrated with the Grade.us brand, it provides a comprehensive range of services for feedback management.

Features: 

➡️Offers basic white-label services 

➡️Offers premium white label services with an upgrade in prices

➡️Assists in gathering and overseeing customer feedback from over 100 platforms.

➡️Sends automated emails and summary reports to team members.

➡️Automatically analyzes reviews to monitor key metrics.

➡️Allows you to monitor your team's response to reviews.

Benefits: 

✅Offers in-depth analytics and reporting features 

✅Provides special attention to agencies 

Cons: 

❌Doesn’t offer a lot of features

❌Limited integrations as compared to other platforms 

❌Expensive as compared to its competitors

Offers Custom Pricing options
what_people_say:
Likes: 

“I love that it pulls all of our reviews into one easy-to-manage dashboard. I also like that it gives us a solid analytic resource for our gains and setbacks. The BIGGEST win is the surveys that we use when clients check out. We can set a threshold to ask if they would like to share on social channels if their rating is above a rating we determine. And even better, we can select which sites to ask to push to, which has been immensely helpful for us to focus on increasing our ratings on specific sites so we have a better overall rating!”

‍

Dislikes:

“It took a little longer for our old Yelp reviews to appear in the dashboard which caused a minor issue with accuracy when pulling a year-over-year report. We did start to receive new Yelp reviews right away and the old ones were pulled in shortly after coming on board.”

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
